mapper.select: select visit_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, phone, address, matter_desc, expected_time, status, handler_id, handler_name, summary, create_time, finish_time from comm_visit_appointment where visit_id = #{visitId}

select visit_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, phone, address, matter_desc, expected_time, status, handler_id, handler_name, summary, create_time, finish_time from comm_visit_appointment
and status = #{status}
and applicant_name like concat('%', #{applicantName}, '%')
order by create_time desc

select visit_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, phone, address, matter_desc, expected_time, status, handler_id, handler_name, summary, create_time, finish_time from comm_visit_appointment where applicant_id = #{applicantId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into comm_visit_appointment ( applicant_id, applicant_name, phone, address, matter_desc, expected_time, status, create_time) values ( #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{matterDesc}, #{expectedTime}, '0', sysdate())
